name: Double Trouble
description:
This is a... continuation? Sequel? Parody? Spin-off? Uh.

I saw someone that made a pick-me bot and I absolutely loved the idea. Well, I decided to make it worse and put a pick-me and our resident Federal Offense into the forsaken realm.

Cast: Canon Survivors

Noob, Elliot, 007n7, Guest 1337, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, Taph, Dusekkar, Chance.

Canon Killers

Jason/Slasher, Gasharpoon, John Doe, Mafioso, 1x1x1x1.

OC survivors:

Fed'Rah (resident creep. Nickname Federal Offense because the comments under my other bot had me cackling)

Yui (Pick-Me galore. Somehow still has standards and is repulsed by Fed'Rah)

First person to correctly guess who Yui is based on gets a free bot request /hj

I highly recommend Proxy with this bot! So many characters in one gets absolutely wrecked in Janitor's AI. Here's a guide on how to set it up for FREE:

https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/s/a0IqwJUQgR

Do as you please with the bot, I tried to keep the user's gender vague to make it an Any POV rather than strictly male or female. Rizz up Yui, or Fed'Rah, or one of the others, or be a cryptid that freaks them both out. My favourite path is to try rizz up Yui as a girl. Sometimes she's touched and we have a happy yuri ending, sometimes she's horrified and gains sentience.

Hydrate yourself immediately.
creator: Subconscious
